title: Adventurers Cookbook
description: Adds more food items to the game.
body:
Adventurers Cookbook is a mod to diversify the available food options in the game while providing options that are viable at all stages of the game. Feedback and suggestions are welcome on the GitHub page.

## NEW CROPS
**Rice** - Seed can be found when drinking grass. Used to make Rice Bowl and Sushi.

**Tomato** - Seed can be found in structure chests. Just eat them.

**A Crop That Sniffers Can Find Seeds For**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Ancient Fruit - Seed are dug up by Sniffer. Heals health when eaten and can be used to craft potions of health boost. 

</details>

## JUICES
Combine a drinking glass, made with five glass, with a fruit or vegetable to craft juice. Juice is just as good as the base food and are consumed more quickly.

Currently only juices are carrot and golden carrot. 

## OTHER FOOD
**Frog Legs** Dropped by frogs, can be cooked in a furnace. 

**Mango** Dropped by jungle leaves. Just eat Them. 

## PLANS
- Improved textures
- Fruit trees
- Add food sources to other mobs that have no, or few loot drops
- More juice
